core_narratives: Saudi Arabia as regional leader and global player
Strategic autonomy from any single partner

decision_history.event_description: OPEC+ production decisions amid global economic uncertainty
decision_history.decision_taken: Maintained production discipline to support oil prices, used production as geopolitical leverage
decision_history.outcome: Oil prices stabilized at levels supporting Saudi fiscal needs

decision_history.event_description: Normalization discussions with Israel paused after Gaza conflict
decision_history.decision_taken: Conditioned normalization on credible Palestinian statehood path, maintained backchannel communications
decision_history.outcome: Normalization delayed but not abandoned, increased regional diplomatic influence

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Royal family, security services, young population, business elites aligned with Vision 2030

military_posture.force_disposition: modernized conventional forces with extensive US equipment
